ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the data was collected */,
  "block" TEXT /* Block identifier for the survey area */,
  "plot" TEXT /* Plot identifier within the block */,
  "grain_m2" REAL /* Grain size in square meters */,
  "grain_comment" TEXT /* Comment on the grain size */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restoration treatment applied */,
  "design" TEXT /* Design of the survey (e.g., AC, AI) */,
  "timepoints" TEXT /* Timepoints of the survey */,
  "time_since_disturbance" REAL /* Time since the last disturbance (in years) */,
  "realm" TEXT /* Realm of the ecosystem (e.g., terrestrial, aquatic) */,
  "taxon" TEXT /* Taxon being studied (e.g., birds, plants) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* General comment about the dataset */,
  "effort" REAL /* Effort in person-hours */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the dataset */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  "survey_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of surveys */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_design FOREIGN KEY ("design") REFERENCES designs ("design_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_realm FOREIGN KEY ("realm") REFERENCES realms ("realm_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_taxon FOREIGN KEY ("taxon") REFERENCES taxa ("taxon_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_timepoints FOREIGN KEY ("timepoints") REFERENCES timepoints ("timepoint_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site (e.g., Ave35, BM) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the site */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the site in square meters */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the site in meters */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the site */,
  "land_use_history" TEXT /* Brief history of land use at the site */,
  "site_manager" TEXT /* Name of the site manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment (e.g., urban_notRestored, urban_restored) */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., riverbank vegetation restoration) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment ended (if applicable) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the treatment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the treatment */,
  "implementation_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of how the treatment was implemented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biodiversity_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "dataset_id" TEXT /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "N" REAL /* Number of species (N) */,
  "S" REAL /* Shannon diversity index (S) */,
  "minN" INTEGER /* Minimum number of individuals (minN) */,
  "Sn" REAL /* Shannon evenness index (Sn) */,
  "ENSPIE" REAL /* Effective number of species (ENSPIE) */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Species coverage */,
  "species_richness" INTEGER /* Number of unique species */,
  "species_evenness" REAL /* Measure of evenness of species distribution */,
  "species_diversity_index" REAL /* Combined measure of species richness and evenness */,
  "rarefaction_curve" TEXT /* Data for rarefaction curve analysis */,
  "beta_diversity" REAL /* Measure of diversity between different datasets or sites */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biodiversity_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" TEXT /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the dataset */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxa" (
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxon */,
  "taxon_name" TEXT /* Name of the taxon (e.g., birds, plants) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the taxon */,
  "taxonomic_rank" TEXT /* Taxonomic rank of the taxon (e.g., family, genus) */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the taxon (e.g., endangered, least concern) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "realms" (
  "realm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each realm */,
  "realm_name" TEXT /* Name of the realm (e.g., terrestrial, aquatic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the realm */,
  "biome" TEXT /* Biome type (e.g., forest, desert) */,
  "ecosystem_services" TEXT /* Ecosystem services provided by the realm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("realm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the design (e.g., AC, AI) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the design */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Detailed methodology used in the survey design */,
  "sampling_strategy" TEXT /* Strategy used for sampling (e.g., random, systematic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timepoints" (
  "timepoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timepoint */,
  "timepoint_name" TEXT /* Name of the timepoint (e.g., T1, T2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the timepoint */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the timepoint */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the timepoint */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the timepoint in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timepoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_abundance" (
  "abundance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each abundance record */,
  "dataset_id" TEXT /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species */,
  "abundance" INTEGER /* Number of individuals of the species */,
  "abundance_method" TEXT /* Method used to estimate abundance (e.g., visual count, acoustic monitoring) */,
  "abundance_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence interval or uncertainty of the abundance estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("abundance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_abundance_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_abundance_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the taxon */,
  "habitat_preference" TEXT /* Preferred habitat of the species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species */,
  "behavior" TEXT /* Behavior of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_taxon_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxon_id") REFERENCES taxa ("taxon_id")
)
